title: Xero Intergrations - Two accounts issue
excerpt: Hi, Wondering if someone could help/advise me.  We operate in both the UK and Ireland, as such it requires us to have 2 Xero accounts which we would need to integrate into the CRM platform as our sales teams will work wi…

posts.author: Davidore (David OReilly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Wondering if someone could help/advise me. We operate in both the UK and Ireland, as such it requires us to have 2 Xero accounts which we would need to integrate into the CRM platform as our sales teams will work with customers in both UK & Ireland. Is it possible to link 2 Xero accounts to Monday? and have information displayed for both?

thanks

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get an answer to this? We are coming up to needing this also.

posts.author: Constacloud (Tehziba Rizvi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Davidore,

Did you find a solution for this? If not, we would be happy to assist you with the same. Our team specializes in creating bespoke integrations, and we’re confident we can develop a seamless connection between Xero and Monday.com for your business, as we have the expertise in the XERO and created several integrations using the same and currently we are in talks with Monday for Integration partners.

I am assuming that may be you want to automatically sync your financial data like invoices/expenses from xero with Monday.com and maintain the records under it.

Let’s chat about the possibilities? I’m available for a call this week, please contact us at sales@constacloud.com.

Looking forward to the opportunity!
